correspondence_rules: If artifact_type == EXPORT_MANIFEST and verdict == PASS, infer export_packaging_pass only.
If a stage receipt says status == blocked_before_promotion or verdict == BLOCKED_NOT_PROMOTED, promotion_pass MUST be false.
If export manifest contains_through_stage references a blocked stage, that blocked stage must remain blocked unless an explicit later promotion authority supersedes it.
Any future baseline promotion must cite both the candidate export package and a promotion receipt/handoff with PASS.
prohibited_inferences: Do not infer FL16 promotion success from FL17 export PASS.
Do not infer baseline replacement from archive integrity alone.
Do not treat contains_through_stage as all-contained-stages-passed.

semantic_rulings.binding: No later export/package PASS may relabel FL16 as promoted unless a later explicit semantic repair stage records a passed promotion receipt/handoff.

evidence.blocker: FL15 ZIP passes extraction/boot but omits FL15 ledger-declared outputs; export validator blocks promotion.

semantic_rulings.subject: FAILURE-LEARNING-16_VALIDATE_AND_PROMOTE_FL15_FULL_EXPORT_WITH_PYTHON_S

semantic_rulings.binding: FL17 export PASS means the repaired archive packaging/provenance passed; it includes FL16 blocked evidence and does not convert FL16 promotion status to PASS.
semantic_rulings.subject: FAILURE-LEARNING-17_REPAIRED_FULL_EXPORT_WITH_FL15_FL16_ARTIFACTS

semantic_terms.blocked_before_promotion: The candidate may be extractable/bootable or packaged, but it failed one or more promotion-blocking gates and must not become baseline.
semantic_terms.export_packaging_pass: The archive package passed packaging/provenance/integrity checks for what it contains.
semantic_terms.promotion_pass: The candidate was explicitly promoted to current clean/baseline source by a passed promotion receipt/handoff.
semantic_terms.validation_pass: The validation stage passed its declared gates.
